dtsPropsFor.SectionHeading: /** Small uppercase gold label above the title (optional). */ eyebrow?: string; /** Main heading text (required). Renders as an <h2> in Manrope. */ title: string; /** Supporting sentence below the title (optional). */ subtitle?: string; /** Text alignment. */ align?: "center" | "left"; /** "light" = ocean title on light surfaces; "dark" = white title for ocean/photo surfaces. */ tone?: "light" | "dark"; className?: string;
